input.script:
# Check all bodies and their dimensions to understand the current state
root = rootComp

print("🔍 Analyzing all bodies in the design...")

for i in range(root.bRepBodies.count):
    body = root.bRepBodies.item(i)
    bbox = body.boundingBox
    width = bbox.maxPoint.x - bbox.minPoint.x
    height = bbox.maxPoint.y - bbox.minPoint.y
    thickness = bbox.maxPoint.z - bbox.minPoint.z
    
    print(f"Body {i}: '{body.name}'")
    print(f"  📐 Dimensions: {width:.2f} x {height:.2f} x {thickness:.2f} cm")
    print(f"  📍 Position: ({bbox.minPoint.x:.1f}, {bbox.minPoint.y:.1f}, {bbox.minPoint.z:.1f})")
    print(f"  👁️ Visible: {body.isVisible}")
    
    if body.physicalProperties:
        volume = body.physicalProperties.volume
        print(f"  📊 Volume: {volume:.2f} cm³")
    print()

# Let's also check the overall design bounds
allBodies = root.bRepBodies
if allBodies.count > 0:
    # Get combined bounding box
    first_body = allBodies.item(0)
    min_x = first_body.boundingBox.minPoint.x
    max_x = first_body.boundingBox.maxPoint.x
    min_y = first_body.boundingBox.minPoint.y  
    max_y = first_body.boundingBox.maxPoint.y
    min_z = first_body.boundingBox.minPoint.z
    max_z = first_body.boundingBox.maxPoint.z
    
    for i in range(1, allBodies.count):
        body = allBodies.item(i)
        bbox = body.boundingBox
        min_x = min(min_x, bbox.minPoint.x)
        max_x = max(max_x, bbox.maxPoint.x)
        min_y = min(min_y, bbox.minPoint.y)
        max_y = max(max_y, bbox.maxPoint.y)
        min_z = min(min_z, bbox.minPoint.z)
        max_z = max(max_z, bbox.maxPoint.z)
    
    total_width = max_x - min_x
    total_height = max_y - min_y  
    total_thickness = max_z - min_z
    
    print(f"🌐 Overall design envelope:")
    print(f"  📐 Total: {total_width:.2f} x {total_height:.2f} x {total_thickness:.2f} cm")
    print(f"  📍 From: ({min_x:.1f}, {min_y:.1f}, {min_z:.1f})")
    print(f"  📍 To: ({max_x:.1f}, {max_y:.1f}, {max_z:.1f})")

result = "info"
